channel.title: Xdebug on mgalalm - blog
channel.description: Recent content in Xdebug on mgalalm - blog

item.title: Mastering Laravel Testing Turbocharge Your Code Coverage With Xdebug
item.description: In the dynamic world of Laravel development, ensuring your code is well-tested isn’t just good practice; it’s essential for creating robust applications. Code coverage serves as a critical metric to assess the extent to which your tests cover your codebase. This guide will walk you through setting up Xdebug for code coverage in Laravel, along with troubleshooting common issues. When you first attempt to run:
